raw_source.title: [Remote] Fortress诚聘 产品经理 薪水 3000-5000usd
raw_source.body:
### About the Role

We are looking for a Product Manager with a strong background in Web3 and DeFi to help drive the next generation of decentralized financial applications. This is a unique opportunity to help shape products at the intersection of financial innovation, smart contract automation, and user-centric design.

You’ll play a key role in defining product strategy, collaborating with engineering and design teams, and engaging directly with users across the decentralized finance ecosystem.

* * *

### Responsibilities

*   Own Product Vision & Strategy  
    Define and articulate the product vision, long-term roadmap, and success metrics in alignment with company goals.
    
*   Lead Full Product Lifecycle  
    Drive the development process from ideation through launch and iteration, ensuring timely delivery and continuous improvement.
    
*   Define & Prioritize Requirements  
    Translate user needs and business goals into clear product specifications and prioritize development tasks based on impact and feasibility.
    
*   User & Stakeholder Engagement  
    Engage with users (including DeFi protocols, wallets, exchanges, and asset managers) to gather feedback, validate concepts, and support adoption.
    
*   Performance Tracking & Optimization  
    Analyze product usage and performance data to inform decisions and optimize for growth, retention, and user satisfaction.
    
*   Market Awareness  
    Stay informed on the evolving DeFi and crypto landscape. Identify trends, opportunities, and competitive insights to drive product differentiation.
    

* * *

### Requirements

*   2+ years of experience in product management, ideally within Web3, DeFi, fintech, or related tech startups.
    
*   Strong technical fluency – able to understand smart contracts, protocol logic, and communicate effectively with engineering teams.
    
*   Analytical and structured thinking – capable of breaking down complex systems and communicating them clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.
    
*   Excellent communication skills – strong in both written and verbal formats; capable of managing stakeholders and conveying vision.
    
*   Product intuition – a deep sense of what makes DeFi products successful from both B2B and retail perspectives.
    
*   Adaptability & ownership – thrives in a fast-moving, ambiguous environment; takes initiative and sees things through.
    

* * *

### Nice to Have

*   Experience working with onchain financial products such as staking, vaults, liquidity provision, or DAOs
    
*   Familiarity with Solana and EVM-compatible ecosystems
*   Exposure to modular protocol design, agent frameworks, or DeFi strategy automation
*   Prior involvement in user research or community engagement within crypto
    

* * *

### What We Offer

*   A mission-driven environment building at the frontier of decentralized finance
    
*   Flat, collaborative culture with room for personal growth and ownership
    
*   Competitive compensation, including equity/token incentives
    
*   Flexible, remote-first team setup

## 薪资福利待遇
3ku - 5ku


## 地点

- 工作地点：Remote
- 联系方式：admin@thefortress.ai

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：是
- 时区要求：（GMT+8优先，可覆盖核心工作时间，可适应国际分布式团队协作）

We are looking for a Product Manager with a strong background in Web3 and DeFi to help drive the next generation of decentralized financial applications. This is a unique opportunity to help shape products at the intersection of financial innovation, smart contract automation, and user-centric design.
You’ll play a key role in defining product strategy, collaborating with engineering and design teams, and engaging directly with users across the decentralized finance ecosystem.
### Responsibilities

* Define & Prioritize Requirements Translate user needs and business goals into clear product specifications and prioritize development tasks based on impact and feasibility.
* User & Stakeholder Engagement Engage with users (including DeFi protocols, wallets, exchanges, and asset managers) to gather feedback, validate concepts, and support adoption.
* Performance Tracking & Optimization Analyze product usage and performance data to inform decisions and optimize for growth, retention, and user satisfaction.
* Market Awareness Stay informed on the evolving DeFi and crypto landscape. Identify trends, opportunities, and competitive insights to drive product differentiation.
### Requirements
* 2+ years of experience in product management, ideally within Web3, DeFi, fintech, or related tech startups.
* Strong technical fluency – able to understand smart contracts, protocol logic, and communicate effectively with engineering teams.
* Analytical and structured thinking – capable of breaking down complex systems and communicating them clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences.
* Excellent communication skills – strong in both written and verbal formats; capable of managing stakeholders and conveying vision.
* Product intuition – a deep sense of what makes DeFi products successful from both B2B and retail perspectives.
* Adaptability & ownership – thrives in a fast-moving, ambiguous environment; takes initiative and sees things through.
### Nice to Have

* Familiarity with Solana and EVM-compatible ecosystems * Exposure to modular protocol design, agent frameworks, or DeFi strategy automation * Prior involvement in user research or community engagement within crypto
### What We Offer
* A mission-driven environment building at the frontier of decentralized finance

* Flexible, remote-first team setup
